$comment: Bloodbank v3 NATS JetStream topology. Stream names and subject prefixes are locked by ADR-0001; do not rename.

streams.name: BLOODBANK_V3_EVENTS

notes: Replays preserve the original CloudEvents id and correlationid.
Replay metadata is added via NATS message headers, not by mutating the envelope.
See compose/v3/nats/README.md for the full header contract.
Durable home for v3 immutable CloudEvents traffic.
Consumed by projections, EventCatalog sync jobs, and service consumers via Dapr `bloodbank-v3-pubsub`.

streams.name: BLOODBANK_V3_COMMANDS

notes: Commands are intended to be handled once (workqueue retention).
Replies are short-lived correlation messages; they are not source-of-truth history.
Do not use this stream as a replay source for rebuilding projections.
Dead-letter handling is documented in README.md and will be implemented in V3-007, not here.
DLQ policy is deliberately out of scope for the scaffold wave.
V3-007 will add per-consumer dead-letter streams and document poison-message handling.
